title: Untrusted Assets, Save Parsing, Paths, Privacy, and Local Security · Behavior Case: Privacy Telemetry
summary: A mod folder escapes its root, decompression consumes memory, pickle loads scores, save files are unlimited, crash reports include home paths, and telemetry starts without consent. Predict player-visible behavior, state, units, timing, input, rendering, feedback, failure, accessibility, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the privacy telemetry increment in bounded local-data and privacy policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory,…
objectives: Minimize diagnostics, redact paths and identifiers, require informed opt-in for telemetry, and document retention and deletion.
Bound image dimensions, decoded memory, sound duration, file count, replay length, event volume, and diagnostic output.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Predict Privacy Telemetry · Theory Privacy Telemetry
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Asteroids team handles case 8355 during an offline cross-platform release rehearsal. Build deterministic Python evidence to bound asset and save paths, sizes, parsing, integrity purpose, privacy, telemetry consent, and untrusted-content behavior; keep every critical cue available through more than color or sound and every action remappable without timing precision; then run the packaged build with dummy video and audio drivers, missing optional sound, and a corrupted save. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Privacy Telemetry contract for the supplied data.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A worked example Asteroids team handles case 8355 during an offline cross-platform release rehearsal. Build deterministic Python evidence to bound asset and save paths, sizes, parsing, integrity purpose, privacy, telemetry consent, and untrusted-content behavior; keep every critical cue available through more than color or sound and every action remappable without timing precision; then run the packaged build with dummy video and audio drivers, missing optional sound, and a corrupted save. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. A defensible solution applies Privacy Telemetry, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to bounded local-data and privacy policy.

content.code:
# Worked focus: asteroids-privacy-telemetry — Minimize diagnostics, redact paths and identifiers, require informed opt-in for telemetry, and document retention and deletion.
# Evidence: asteroids-worked-asteroids-security-save-assets-5
# Competency: asteroids-worked-asteroids-security-save-assets-5.
# Case 9036: a controller-remapping accessibility review.
# Operating constraint: record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, playtest observation, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: run the packaged build with dummy video and audio drivers, missing optional sound, and a corrupted save.
def worked_asteroids_security_save_assets_5(untrusted_paths: int = 6, rejected_paths: int = 6, save_size: int = 4096, save_limit: int = 65536, remote_content: bool = False, telemetry_opt_in: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "playerworked5",
        "seed9036",
        "input5dekrow",
        "frameworked59036",
        "state9036worked5",
        "playtest5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if untrusted_paths < 0 or rejected_paths < 0:
        return False, rejected_paths, "security-domain"
    if rejected_paths != untrusted_paths:
        return False, rejected_paths, "path-admission"
    if save_size < 0 or save_size > save_limit:
        return False, save_size, "save-budget"
    if remote_content or not telemetry_opt_in:
        return False, save_size, "external-data"
    assert save_size <= save_limit
    return True, rejected_paths, "bounded-local-data"
content.caption: Runnable deterministic pure-Python Asteroids decision model; trace one accepted and one rejected frame, input, seam, collision, cue, save, package, or release case, then state which native pygame-ce, SDL, display, controller, audio, filesystem, GPU, accessibility playtest, installer, performance, recovery, or publication claim still needs controlled transfer evidence.

options.text: Reconstruct the conditions for Privacy Telemetry, gather a counterexample, repair the artifact, and add a regression case.

Keep the Privacy Telemetry artifact unchanged and rewrite its explanation so the unsupported output appears intentional. That claim fails the repair the privacy telemetry defect evidence boundary for Privacy Telemetry.

For repair the privacy telemetry defect, run one convenient high-frame-rate happy path, omit revision, seed, input and time trace, units, seams, device changes, entity reconciliation, multichannel cues, accessibility settings, failures, recovery, and desktop transfer, then accept a playable animation as Asteroids proof. This does not satisfy Privacy Telemetry for bounded local-data and privacy policy.

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Defend the Privacy Telemetry model · Theory Privacy Telemetry
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Privacy Telemetry: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory Asteroids team handles case 5449 during a headless continuous-integration replay. Build deterministic Python evidence to bound asset and save paths, sizes, parsing, integrity purpose, privacy, telemetry consent, and untrusted-content behavior; test empty, zero-vector, seam, low-frame-rate, focus-loss, device-loss, missing-asset, corrupted-save, and rejected cases; then lose window focus while thrust and fire are held, then prove both actions release safely. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Minimize diagnostics, redact paths and identifiers, require informed opt-in for telemetry, and document retention and deletion.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Minimize diagnostics, redact paths and identifiers, require informed opt-in for telemetry, and document retention and deletion.
